exploration_notes: Traced the complete Kafka SASL authentication flow from channel creation through authorization. The analysis covers: (1) ChannelBuilders → SaslChannelBuilder factory that wires up per-mechanism callback handlers and JAAS contexts; (2) SaslServerAuthenticator state machine (INITIAL_REQUEST → HANDSHAKE → AUTHENTICATE → COMPLETE) as the primary untrusted data entry point; (3) Three mechanism implementations — PLAIN (RFC 4616 NUL-delimited tokens with constant-time comparison), SCRAM-SHA-256/512 (RF
